tools.name: treasury_buffer_status
tools.description: Given the ARS balance and upcoming AFIP obligations, compute the peso buffer needed within a horizon (with a safety multiple) and any shortfall. Pure (clock injected).

tools.name: treasury_monotributo
tools.description: Monthly monotributo cuota (ARS) and/or the category for an annual income. Values eff. 2026-02-01 (IPC-indexed). Monotributo is for a persona-humana operator; a SAS/SRL is in the general regime. Pure.

tools.name: treasury_offramp_convert
tools.description: EXECUTE an off-ramp: sell USDC and pay out ARS to the society's CVU via the PSAV. IRREVERSIBLE. Requires human approval (RFC-001) and is kill-switch gated. Async settlement; confirm with treasury_offramp_status.
tools.sideEffect: IRREVERSIBLE: moves real money (crypto sale + ARS payout to CVU)

tools.name: treasury_offramp_quote
tools.description: Live USDC->ARS quote from the configured registered-PSAV off-ramp (Manteca). Read-only. Returns {available:false} if no off-ramp is configured.

tools.name: treasury_offramp_status
tools.description: Poll the settlement status of a prior treasury_offramp_convert by txId. Confirm the ARS landed in the CVU before marking an obligation funded. Returns {available:false} without an off-ramp.

tools.name: treasury_plan_conversion
tools.description: Plan a just-in-time USDC->ARS conversion: how much USDC to convert to top the ARS buffer, net of spread, capped by available USDC. Never over-converts. Plans only; does not execute. Pure.

tools.name: treasury_settlement_plan
tools.description: How a tax obligation actually gets paid, honestly. No method pays autonomously at pay-time (canAutoExecute is always false); debito_automatico is passive after one-time enrolment, vep/mp need a human. Pure.

tools.name: treasury_tax_estimate
tools.description: Estimate the Ganancias cedular owed (ARS) on disposing crypto: 5% (sold in pesos, no adjustment clause) or 15% (foreign currency), on the GAIN only. Crypto is IVA-exempt. Pure.
